name: old-hand
description: Evidence-first engineering judgment for Codex coding tasks.

interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex skill that stays active across substantive implementation, debugging, refactoring, review, architecture, and dependency choices, while researching comparable projects and showing a concise decision brief before new directions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $old-hand for every substantive coding task; research new directions and show the resulting decision brief.
